mapper.select: SELECT * FROM salary_plan ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM salary_plan WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO salary_plan (plan_name, description, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{planName}, #{description}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE salary_plan SET plan_name = #{planName}, description = #{description}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE salary_plan SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM salary_plan_item WHERE plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO salary_plan_item (plan_id, item_name, item_code, item_type, category, calc_rule, sort_order, is_enabled, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{planId}, #{itemName}, #{itemCode}, #{itemType}, #{category}, #{calcRule}, #{sortOrder}, #{isEnabled}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO salary_plan_scope (plan_id, scope_type, target_id, target_value, priority, effective_date, create_time) VALUES (#{planId}, #{scopeType}, #{targetId}, #{targetValue}, #{priority}, #{effectiveDate}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT sp.* FROM salary_plan sp JOIN salary_plan_scope sps ON sp.id = sps.plan_id WHERE sp.status = 1 AND sps.effective_date <= CURDATE() ORDER BY sps.priority DESC LIMIT 1
